title: handshake.inspect request

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

oneOf.description: Action-specific data input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

items.description: Action-specific data input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

oneOf.description: Ordered data entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

data.description: Valid-ready or protocol payload signal path. Data-specific checks run only when it is supplied.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

ready.description: Action-specific ready input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

max_wait_cycles.description: Maximum consecutive wait cycles from a sampled valid=1 until handshake.

check_data_stable_when_stalled.description: Effective only when data is supplied; checks whether data changes while valid=1 and ready=0.

require_valid_hold_until_handshake.description: Checks that valid remains asserted from its first assertion through valid&&ready handshake.

ready_without_valid.description: Reporting granularity for ready=1 and valid=0. This is activity information, not by itself a protocol violation.

rules.description: Valid-ready inspection rules. Omitted fields use their declared schema defaults.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

valid.description: Action-specific valid input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Inspect valid-ready transfers, stalls, and stability violations.
x-how_it_works: 按 clock 采样 valid/ready/data，统计 stall、transfer 和数据稳定性违规。
x-when_to_use: 定位握手停顿和协议风险。

use_when: 需要检查通用 valid-ready transfer、stall 或数据稳定性。
do_not_use_when: 需要 AXI/APB 专用 transaction 关联。
